global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a strong call to action and user confidence.
global.main_message: Encourages users to save confidently with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Top background area
elements.description: A light green rectangular area at the top of the ad, providing a subtle background.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center, featuring a light green background with abstract shapes.

elements.label: Main text message
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Save with confidence' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Subtext
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message, reading 'Fast signup, instant card'.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Try for free' in white, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Secondary content area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area in the center with a light green background, possibly for additional content.

elements.label: Additional content area
elements.description: Another rectangular area in the center, similar in style to the previous element.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Small circular shapes in the center area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Lower content area
elements.description: A small rectangular area at the bottom, possibly for additional information.

elements.label: Lower left area
elements.description: A small rectangular area at the bottom left, likely for supplementary content.

elements.label: Main message area
elements.description: A large area at the bottom featuring the main text and call to action.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Fast ard Try for free

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, labeled 'Vaultkun'.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag at the top left corner labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content.
